rationale: X's top finding (test_expert_parallel_layout.py:121 — TP missing device_communicator/reduce_scatter assertions despite now using init_vllm_model_parallel_group) is essentially the same concern the human reviewer raised inline at that exact line about verifying reduce_scatter coverage. X's other findings (stale comment, removed cfg_parallel_size>1 guard, missing docstring) are all grounded in the actual diff and mostly valid, if minor and somewhat redundant. Y produced a thorough, technically competent verification pass but concluded APPROVE and completely missed the one substantive gap the human reviewer flagged, offering only a vague non-actionable stylistic comment instead.
